evals.name: technical-audit
evals.prompt: Run a full technical SEO audit on the codebase using your specialized script and identify any missing metadata or alt tags in the src/ directory.
evals.expected_output: The skill should execute seo_audit.py, list the findings (missing alt tags, metadata, etc.), and provide a high-level summary of the site's technical SEO health.

evals.name: on-page-optimization
evals.prompt: Optimize the SEO for the support page (src/app/support/page.tsx). Add a proper metadata export with a compelling title and description targeting 'peptide research support' and 'Biolongevity Labs'.
evals.expected_output: The skill should modify src/app/support/page.tsx to include an exported metadata object that follows best practices (50-60 char title, 150-160 char description).

evals.name: schema-markup-injection
evals.prompt: Implement JSON-LD Product schema for the product detail page (src/app/product/[id]/page.tsx). Ensure it dynamically includes the product name and price if possible, or provide a template for it.
evals.expected_output: The skill should add a JSON-LD script block with @context schema.org and @type Product to the product detail page component.
